docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPSKIE, GREGORY A. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOPSKIE, GREGORY A. $108,398.57 PRINCIPAL, $1,603.70 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $110,437.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
